title: BUS PASS PROGRAM - 211info
text: SAFE SLEEP UNITED BUS PASS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides bus passes to partner agencies that distribute them to those in need of transportation support. Does not provide bus passes to individuals. 1910 Front Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Varies by partner agency Hours: Not applicable Email (503) 816-3409 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 816-3409 Main phone Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for the list of partner agencies FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties Services: Bus Fare Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - SAFE SLEEP UNITED If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SAFE SLEEP UNITED
